notes: Simple low-salt aqueous elution buffers are treated as long-stability for hackathon modeling.
Primer stocks are stable long-term frozen; use as conservative scheduling proxy for same-week shared setup.
PCR-grade or nuclease-free water treated as long-stability simple aqueous reagent.
Fresh 70 percent ethanol modeled as stable for one week at room temperature; aligns with three-bucket guidance.
Reagent-grade water used as elution solvent; long-stability.
TE / Tris elution buffer treated as stable at 4C; conservative but permissive for same-week shared prep.
